summary: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Piece movement via drag-and-drop now works. The issue was in the onPieceDrop callback signature - react-chessboard v5 passes a single object {piece, sourceSquare, targetSquare} instead of three separate parameters. Fixed the function signature and verified full gameplay flow works.
passed_tests: Piece movement via drag-and-drop works correctly (e2 to e4 tested)
Move is sent to server and persisted
Move history updates correctly after each move
Timer behavior is correct - black timer only starts after white's first move
Turn alternation works - shows 'THINKING' for opponent's turn
Last move highlighting works (e2 and e4 squares highlighted)
Game join flow works (status changes to active)
Move validation works (cannot move out of turn)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: onPieceDrop callback signature changed from (sourceSquare, targetSquare, piece) to ({ piece, sourceSquare, targetSquare }) to match react-chessboard v5 API
Added null check for targetSquare since it can be null if piece is dropped off board
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both critical bugs are now fixed. Piece movement works via drag-and-drop. Timer logic is correct. The fix was changing the onPieceDrop callback signature to match react-chessboard v5 API which passes a single object instead of three parameters.

bug_1_piece_movement.symptom: Pieces could not be moved during a game via UI drag-and-drop
bug_1_piece_movement.root_cause: The onPieceDrop callback in Game.jsx had incorrect function signature. react-chessboard v5 passes a single object {piece, sourceSquare, targetSquare} but the code expected three separate parameters (sourceSquare, targetSquare, piece)
bug_1_piece_movement.fix_applied: Changed function signature from 'const onPieceDrop = (sourceSquare, targetSquare, piece)' to 'const onPieceDrop = ({ piece, sourceSquare, targetSquare })'
bug_1_piece_movement.verification: Tested drag-and-drop of e2 pawn to e4 - move was successful, sent to server, and displayed in move history

bug_2_timer.symptom: Timer was starting for wrong player
bug_2_timer.root_cause: Timer logic was already correctly implemented in the code at lines 215-251

mocked_apis.wallet_system: Cryptocurrency wallet balances are simulated - no real blockchain integration
